chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-3258 of 2024 Abid Ali and others Versus Federation of Pakistan and others DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Priority 1. For orders on Misc. No.14425/2024. 2. For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 06.08.2024 Mr. Ahmed Ali Hussain, Advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Khaleeq Ahmed, Deputy Attorney General. Mr. Manzoor Alam Khan, Special Prosecutor NAB. Inspectors Shabbir Ahmed Chandio and Farhan Abbasi, I.O of case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. The petitioners have already not pressed prayer clause ‘I’ to ‘V’, whereas, insofar as prayer clause ‘VI’ is concerned, learned D.A.G Mr. Khaleeq Ahmed claimed and conceded that there is no FIR against the petitioners registered in pursuance of enquiries No.E-58/2023 and E-50/2023. With this understanding Mr. Ahmed Ali Hussain is satisfied and does not press this petition. The petition as such is dismissed as not pressed along with pending application(s). CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
